title: Acclamator-class transport drop ship

The '''''Acclamator''-class transport drop ship''', also known as the '''Imperial landing craft'''<ref name="TCSWE" /> or '''Kuat dropship'''<ref name="E" /> was a model of large [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military [[Transport/Legends|transport]] that was utilized during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Forward-command-post.png|thumb|left|180px|''Acclamator'' drop ships over Hoth.]]

Design-wise, with its wedge-shape, the drop ship resembled [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]],<ref name="SWI127">[[Star Wars Insider 127|''Star Wars Insider'' 127]]</ref> especially the models of the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] line.<ref name="AOEB">{{FFGTCG|set=Assault on Echo Base|cardname=Forward Command Post}}</ref> Unlike these vessels, the large drop ship had a less aerodynamic shape, and a rather broad front compared with the straight dagger-shape of most of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat's]] other [[Warship/Legends|warships]]. At least one variant had a rectangular area at the lower front of the vessel.<ref name="E" />

[[File:SunberRebellion.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A [[Dropship/Legends|dropship]] deploys armored vehicles to support [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber's]] force.]]

These transports were used to rapidly deploy large, mechanized forces on a greater scale than most other Imperial landing craft, by utilizing elevator decks of various sizes to unload multiple heavy vehicles at once. The large elevator could accommodate at least one [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]], one [[HAVw A5 Juggernaut|A5 Juggernaut]] tank, and either several smaller [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]],<ref name="E" /> or an [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|All Terrain Tactical Enforcer]].<ref name="SWR" /> The transport drop ship was armed with several gun batteries on either side of the vessel.<ref name="E" />

==History==
Several models of these dropships were utilized in large battles that had a heavy presence of armored units, such as the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], where they were used to drop off AT-ATs and other vehicles.<ref name="E" /><ref name="TCSWE" /><ref name="AOEB" /> During the [[Battle of Keskin|Battle of]] [[Keskin]], ''Acclamator'' dropships were deployed quite close to the frontlines, yet seemed to escape most artillery fire and deployed their cargo efficiently.<ref name="SWR" />

*[[Rebellion 1|''Rebellion'' 1]]
